description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its width. The grooves are deep and dark, contrasting with the lighter, speckled stone material that makes up the rest of the block. The sides of the block are solid and unadorned, with a uniform dark coloration, suggesting a dense and heavy construction. The top surface appears slightly rough, with a matte finish that reduces glare and highlights the texture of the stone. The block is thick and robust, likely designed to serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. Its overall appearance is utilitarian, with no visible markings, engravings, or decorative elements.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with parallel grooves on its top surface and solid, dark sides. The block has a rough, matte finish and a utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the parallel grooves running horizontally across the top surface, with the solid dark front face visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and spacing of the grooves, with the solid dark side face visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the parallel grooves and the solid back face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the groove pattern and the solid side face.
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no signs of erosion or moss.
